requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 Evidence for Slovenia PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——斯洛文尼亚光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——斯洛維尼亞光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000證據

summary.en: Slovenia PV inverter EMC expectations should be prepared on an IEC/EN basis because SIST is the national standards body and project specifications for grid-connected PV commonly reference IEC-family inverter evidence. The practical EMC package should include IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment and applicable IEC 61000-series evidence for emissions, immunity, harmonics, surge, voltage dips, and power quality. For ELES/Agen-E grid-connected projects, harmonic and conducted-emission evidence should be tied to the actual inverter model, rating, and configuration. Because Slovenia uses a 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid (identical to the EU standard), EMC and harmonic results obtained under China 220/380 V conditions should be reviewed for applicability before submission. Slovenian-language documentation is commonly expected.
summary.zh: 斯洛文尼亚光伏逆变器EMC要求应按IEC/EN体系准备，因为SIST是国家标准机构，并网光伏项目规格通常引用IEC系列逆变器证据。实际EMC包应包括面向光伏功率变换设备的IEC 62920，以及适用的IEC 61000系列发射、抗扰度、谐波、浪涌、电压暂降和电能质量证据。对于ELES/Agen-E并网项目，谐波和传导发射证据应对应实际逆变器型号、功率等级和配置。由于斯洛文尼亚电网为230/400 V、50 Hz（与欧盟标准相同），仅在中国220/380 V条件下取得的EMC和谐波结果，在提交前应审查其适用性。通常期望提供斯洛文尼亚语文件。
summary.zht: 斯洛維尼亞光伏逆變器EMC要求應按IEC/EN體系準備，因為SIST是國家標準機構，併網光伏項目規格通常引用IEC系列逆變器證據。實際EMC包應包括面向光伏功率轉換設備的IEC 62920，以及適用的IEC 61000系列發射、抗擾度、諧波、浪湧、電壓暫降和電能品質證據。對於ELES/Agen-E併網項目，諧波和傳導發射證據應對應實際逆變器型號、功率等級和配置。由於斯洛維尼亞電網為230/400 V、50 Hz（與歐盟標準相同），僅在中國220/380 V條件下取得的EMC和諧波結果，在提交前應審查其適用性。通常期望提供斯洛維尼亞語文件。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test, immunity, harmonic, surge, voltage-dip, and power-quality standards as applicable to the inverter configuration
SIST standards adoption and project specification requirements where applicable
ELES/Agen-E grid-connection review requirements for power quality and harmonic performance

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021 and related domestic EMC test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories. These reports can be useful engineering background but are not automatically equivalent to IEC 62920 or the IEC 61000-series evidence requested by a Slovenia project owner, SIST conformity route, Agen-E review, or ELES grid-connection process. China test conditions are normally aligned with the China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline, while Slovenia uses 230/400 V at the same frequency.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021及来自CNAS认可实验室的相关国内EMC测试报告。这些报告可作为工程背景，但不能自动等同于斯洛文尼亚项目业主、SIST合格评定路径、Agen-E审查或ELES并网流程要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列证据。中国测试条件通常对应中国220/380 V、50 Hz基准，而斯洛文尼亚在相同频率下使用230/400 V。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021及來自CNAS認可實驗室的相關國內EMC測試報告。這些報告可作為工程背景，但不能自動等同於斯洛維尼亞項目業主、SIST合格評定路徑、Agen-E審查或ELES併網流程要求的IEC 62920或IEC 61000系列證據。中國測試條件通常對應中國220/380 V、50 Hz基準，而斯洛維尼亞在相同頻率下使用230/400 V。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CNAS-accredited domestic EMC test reports under China standard scopes

gap.en: Gap: China-only EMC certificates under GB/T 37408 do not automatically satisfy Slovenia IEC/EN-based project expectations. Exporters should obtain IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the specific model or family, confirm whether harmonics and conducted-emission results remain valid at 230/400 V, and provide surge, earthing, shielding, and enclosure documentation suitable for the installation. Where ELES or the project owner specifies harmonic limits or power-quality measurements, test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause to that requirement.
gap.zh: 差距：仅依据GB/T 37408的中国EMC证书不能自动满足斯洛文尼亚IEC/EN体系项目要求。出口商应取得针对特定型号或系列的IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，确认谐波和传导发射结果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，并提供适合安装环境的浪涌、接地、屏蔽和外壳文件。若ELES或项目业主规定谐波限值或电能质量测量，应将测试报告逐条映射至该要求。
gap.zht: 差距：僅依據GB/T 37408的中國EMC證書不能自動滿足斯洛維尼亞IEC/EN體系項目要求。出口商應取得針對特定型號或系列的IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，確認諧波和傳導發射結果在230/400 V下是否仍有效，並提供適合安裝環境的浪湧、接地、屏蔽和外殼文件。若ELES或項目業主規定諧波限值或電能品質測量，應將測試報告逐條映射至該要求。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and effectively mandatory where SIST, Agen-E, ELES, or project-owner documentation calls for IEC EMC and power-quality evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 EMC evidence is a China domestic voluntary or certification-programme baseline and is not a Slovenia IEC evidence substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Slovenia PV inverter EMC as an IEC evidence package, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Prepare IEC 62920 and applicable IEC 61000-series reports for the exact inverter model, review harmonic and EMC applicability at Slovenia's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid voltage, and confirm any SIST, Agen-E, ELES, or project-owner EMC requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯洛文尼亚光伏逆变器EMC应按IEC证据包处理，而不是直接转移中国GB/T证书。请为准确逆变器型号准备IEC 62920及适用IEC 61000系列报告，审查谐波和EMC结果在斯洛文尼亚230/400 V、50 Hz电网电压下的适用性，并在出货前确认任何SIST、Agen-E、ELES或项目业主EMC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯洛維尼亞光伏逆變器EMC應按IEC證據包處理，而不是直接轉移中國GB/T證書。請為準確逆變器型號準備IEC 62920及適用IEC 61000系列報告，審查諧波和EMC結果在斯洛維尼亞230/400 V、50 Hz電網電壓下的適用性，並在出貨前確認任何SIST、Agen-E、ELES或項目業主EMC要求。
